title: HomeTown Global Group is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: HomeTown Global Group is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
HomeTown Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About HomeTown Global Group:
HomeTown Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeTown Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
